title: Fee
description: An individual fee applied to a checkout or cart. Represents a surcharge, service fee, or other additional charge beyond the item subtotal.

description.description: Optional explanation of why the fee is charged.

amount.description: Fee amount in minor (cents) currency units.

fee_type.description: Type of fee (open string). Well-known values: service, handling, recycling, processing, regulatory, convenience, restocking, environmental. Platforms SHOULD handle unknown values gracefully.

taxable.description: Whether this fee is subject to tax.

waivable.description: Whether this fee can be waived (e.g., membership removes the fee).

allocations.description: Breakdown of how this fee was allocated to specific targets. Sum of allocation amounts equals total fee amount.
